active_color.description: Color used for the current and already-sung lyric characters. Defaults to the interface text color.
active_color.label: Active lyric color

animation.description: How lyrics animate on line change.
animation.label: Animation

apple_developer_token.description: Developer token used for Apple Music catalog and lyrics requests.
apple_developer_token.label: Apple Music developer token

apple_storefront.description: Apple Music storefront code, for example us, cn, jp, or hk.
apple_storefront.label: Apple Music storefront

apple_user_token.description: Optional Music-User-Token for lyrics requiring a user subscription.
apple_user_token.label: Apple Music user token

char_width.description: Approximate pixel width per character, used to fix the widget width and clip scrolling.
char_width.label: Character width (px)

cover_radius.description: Corner radius used by the custom cover shape.
cover_radius.label: Cover corner radius

cover_size.description: Album artwork width and height in logical pixels.
cover_size.label: Cover size

cue_font_family.description: Installed font family used only for intro and interlude characters in custom-font mode.
cue_font_family.label: Intro/interlude font

cue_font_mode.description: Choose whether intro and interlude characters follow Noctalia's interface font or use another installed font.
cue_font_mode.label: Intro/interlude font mode

cue_text.description: Text or characters highlighted during intros and interludes.
cue_text.label: Intro/interlude characters

custom_json_field.description: Lyrics field in a JSON response, with dotted paths such as data.lyric. Leave empty for plain LRC.
custom_json_field.label: JSON lyrics field

custom_url.description: Supports {title}, {artist}, {album}, and {duration} placeholders. Text responses may contain LRC directly.
custom_url.label: Custom endpoint URL

display_mode.description: Always show lyrics, always show track information, or allow left-click switching.
display_mode.label: Display mode

double_line.description: Show translation or romanization below the current original lyric.
double_line.label: Double-line lyrics

double_line_auto_fit.description: Reduce both font sizes and their gap on horizontal bars so capsule backgrounds do not clip the second line. Vertical bars are unchanged.
double_line_auto_fit.label: Compact double lines

double_line_height_budget.description: Approximate total text height available on a horizontal bar. Lower values make both lines more compact.
double_line_height_budget.label: Double-line height budget

font_family.description: Installed font family for all lyrics. Leave empty to follow Noctalia.
font_family.label: Lyrics font family

font_style.description: Text baseline style supported by the Noctalia renderer.
font_style.label: Font layout style

gradient.description: Light up each character as the song progresses (karaoke style).
gradient.label: Per-character gradient

inactive_color.description: Color used for upcoming lyrics, paused playback, and secondary lines.
inactive_color.label: Inactive lyric color

karaoke_enabled.description: Use source character timings or simulated line progress for per-character highlighting.
karaoke_enabled.label: Per-character karaoke

line_gap.description: Spacing between original, translation, romanization, and context lines.
line_gap.label: Line gap

lyrics_offset_ms.description: Positive values show lyrics earlier; negative values show them later.
lyrics_offset_ms.label: Lyrics offset (ms)

lyrics_source.description: Choose a preset source, local-player lyrics, a custom endpoint, or external push protocol.
lyrics_source.label: Lyrics source

lyrics_sources.description: Source IDs tried from top to bottom: lrclib, netease, splayer, qqmusic, kugou, qishui, apple_music, spotify, musixmatch, mpris, or custom.
lyrics_sources.label: Automatic source order

marquee_speed.description: Pixels per second for long-line scrolling.
marquee_speed.label: Marquee speed

max_chars.description: Visible width before a long lyric line scrolls (marquee).
max_chars.label: Max characters

max_lines.description: Maximum lyric lines to show at once.
max_lines.label: Max lines

musixmatch_token.description: User token for the Musixmatch desktop subtitle endpoint.
musixmatch_token.label: Musixmatch user token

padding_left.description: Empty space before the widget content.
padding_left.label: Left padding

padding_right.description: Empty space after the widget content.
padding_right.label: Right padding

player_allowlist.description: Only use matching MPRIS player names or instances. Supports * wildcards; leave empty to allow all players.
player_allowlist.label: Allowed players

player_blocklist.description: Ignore matching MPRIS player names or instances. Supports * wildcards and takes priority over the allowlist.
player_blocklist.label: Blocked players

poll_interval_ms.description: How often the service refreshes MPRIS metadata and playback position.
poll_interval_ms.label: Player polling interval (ms)

primary_font_size.description: Font size for the original lyric line. Zero follows Noctalia.
primary_font_size.label: Primary lyric font size

qishui_api_url.description: Endpoint template supporting {title}, {artist}, and {album}. Required because public Qishui endpoints vary.
qishui_api_url.label: Qishui API URL

qishui_token.description: Optional Bearer token sent only to the configured Qishui endpoint.
qishui_token.label: Qishui token

scroll_mode.description: How lyrics scroll in the bar.
scroll_mode.label: Scroll mode

secondary_color.description: Color used for translation and romanization lines.
secondary_color.label: Secondary lyric color

secondary_font_size.description: Font size for translations and romanization.
secondary_font_size.label: Secondary font size

secondary_line_mode.description: Choose which additional lyric layer is preferred.
secondary_line_mode.label: Secondary line content

show_cover.description: Display the song's album art next to the lyrics.
show_cover.label: Show album cover

show_romanization.description: Allow romanized or transliterated lyrics to appear on the secondary line.
show_romanization.label: Show romanization

show_translation.description: Allow translated lyrics to appear on the secondary line.
show_translation.label: Show translation

splayer_api_url.description: SPlayer local service URL. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:25884 and reads the complete lyrics currently loaded by SPlayer.
splayer_api_url.label: SPlayer API URL

spotify_access_token.description: Optional manually supplied Spotify access token. Takes priority over sp_dc.
spotify_access_token.label: Spotify access token

spotify_sp_dc.description: Optional manually supplied Spotify web cookie. Stored as a normal plugin setting; never written to logs.
spotify_sp_dc.label: Spotify sp_dc

translation_language.description: Preferred translated-lyric language when supported by the source.
translation_language.label: Translation language
